[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / ceil

# Method: ceil()

```ts
ceil(value): number;
```

Round up to the closest integer.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Value to round up. |

## Returns

`number`

Smallest integer greater than or equal to the value.
